mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, t1.report_count, t1.report_type, t2.task_code, t4.product_id product_id1, t4.sample_name, t1.count_price, DATE (t1.request_date) request_date, t3.sample_id, t4.sample_code, t4.sample_name sample_name1, t4.specs, t4.outward, t4.product_id, t5.state, t6.check_item_id, t6.check_item_name, t9.specs_content, t9.check_result, t9.judge_result, t6.coordinate, t7.specs_content value, CONCAT(t7.check_basis_code, ":", t7.condition_value) label FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t1.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 ON t1.id = t5.entrust_id AND t4.id = t5.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_product_item t6 ON t5.check_item_id = t6.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_report_qualifcation t7 ON t6.check_item_id = t7.check_item_id left join test_report_record t8 on t1.id = t8.entrustment_id left join test_report_record_detail t9 on t8.id = t9.record_id and t5.check_item_id = t9.check_item_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t2.task_code, t4.sample_name, t1.count_price, t1.request_date FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t1.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id left join test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 on t1.id = t5.entrust_id and t4.id = t5.sample_id where t2.task_code is not null and t5.state = 3

SELECT id, task_code as taskCode, sample_name as sampleName, price as countPrice, required_completion_time as requestDate, operate_time as operateTime FROM test_report_record WHERE state !=2
and task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')

SELECT t1.id as id, t1.task_code as task_code, t1.sample_name as sample_name, t1.price as count_price, t1.required_completion_time as requestDate, t1.operate_time as operateTime, t2.check_item_name as checkItemName, t2.specs_content as specsContent, t2.check_result checkResult, t2.judge_result as judgeResult FROM test_report_record as t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail as t2 ON t1.id = t2.record_id WHERE t1.state !=2 and t1.id = #{id}
